audit_items.proof_trace: lolwut.c performs a single sds allocation in lolwutUnstableCommand; the pointer is passed to addReplyBulkSds which unconditionally frees it via addReplySds (networking.c:330) and is never referenced again. lolwutCommand allocates no heap memory (uses REDIS_VERSION, a compile-time constant). No free(), double-free, or use-after-free is possible in this 57-line file.
